title: Free-list corruption in incremental-vacuum mode
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, value DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Test2', NULL);
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 10 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC;
